title: AutoMessenger
description: Server-wide messenger that sends a custom message every few ticks. With Simplified Text Format support!
body:
# AutoMessenger
Displays a server-wide message after a custom amount of time via configuration file (ticks). All messages support [Simplified Text Format](https://placeholders.pb4.eu/user/text-format/) and Minecraft MOTD Colors Codes. I strongly recommend using Simplified Text Format for the amount of options it has.


## Config file
Customize your messages and the time between each message in the config file `automessenger.properties`.
